expectations.evidence: "## Remedy 1: Ingebrekestelling (Notice of Default)" and "you must first send an **ingebrekestelling** - a formal written notice to the agency stating that: The statutory decision deadline has passed; The agency is in default (in gebreke); You demand a decision to be issued."

"## Remedy 2: Dwangsom bij Niet Tijdig Beslissen (Art. 4:17 Awb)" and "Art. 4:17 Awb - Dwangsom bij niet tijdig beslissen (penalty payment for failure to decide on time)" - dwangsom amounts and procedure fully explained
"**Legal Basis**: Algemene wet bestuursrecht (Awb), in particular Art. 4:13-4:15 (decision terms) and Art. 4:17-4:19 (dwangsom bij niet tijdig beslissen)" - extensive Awb citations throughout
"This is an AI-generated legal analysis and does **NOT constitute legal advice** within the meaning of the Dutch Advocates Act (Advocatenwet)."
